programme.desc: The character goes to the beach to find out how waves are formed and what fun can be had with them

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The lights are excited to get their Christmas presents - until they discover they are on a tree in the middle of a frozen lake

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary series giving an insight into the world of debt collection. Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy try to collect a debt from a technology company, but with the director nowhere to be seen, the office manager does everything she can to prove the business is no longer trading. Stewart McCracken and Elmor Victor face a heartbreaking house repossession in Merseyside, where two landlords are forced to evict a tenant recovering from a brain tumour which has cost him his job and income

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Catching up with tenants and landlords from previous episodes, including a man living in a damp and mouldy flat, who was unable to sleep in the bedroom due to the horrendous conditions. The programme also revisits a 70-year-old landlady whose tenants stopped paying the rent for a year, and the council's Rogue Landlord Team in Lewisham, who learned where a slum property owner's reputation for a short fuse came from

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Nikau declares he is returning to the Parata house, and Mac is comforted by the idea that Leon is unlikely to attack with the cops hanging around

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: When Amy learns Lassiters are doing a photo shoot with the original uniform prototypes, she freaks out, and Ricardo's indecent proposal still hangs over Nicolette

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A quiet Suffolk street is torn apart by a 71-year-old man believed to be deliberately breaching the peace, while the Fergusons in Wolverhampton experience trouble with their neighbour, whose extension begins to invade their space. Plus, former soldier Philip Taylor from Whitby, North Yorkshire, takes the law into his own hands after his neighbours purchase a strip of grassland that he had tended for many years and deny him access to his caravan

programme.title: A Deceitful Mother: Lies That Kill (2020)
programme.desc: After 16-year-old Tara finds her birth mother on a DNA website, her dedicated adoptive mother struggles to protect the youngster as the wildly unpredictable biological mum crashes into their lives, exhibiting increasingly erratic behaviour. Thriller, starring Tanya Clarke, Aria Pullman and Monica Rose Betz

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: When Amy learns Lassiters are doing a photo shoot with the original uniform prototypes, she freaks out, and Ricardo's indecent proposal still hangs over Nicolette

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Nikau declares he is returning to the Parata house, and Mac is comforted by the idea that Leon is unlikely to attack with the cops hanging around

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ships
programme.desc: The Seven Seas Explorer prepares to leave Southampton on a cruise around the Baltics, but as 700 new guests board the vessel various challenges await the crew as the terrible British weather threatens to scupper the lavish Sail Away Party. Every Sunday at sea, the Explorer puts on a spectacular no-expenses-spared Sea Day Brunch, though after a rocky start it remains to be seen whether it will meet the expectations of the demanding guests. Meanwhile, there's is a first in the 20-year career of cruise director John, as he receives a special invitation from the guests of the £8,000-a-night Regent Suite

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: The comedian ventures east of the Pennines on a 126-mile journey that begins at the North Yorkshire village of Runswick Bay, where she goes hunting for a rare gemstone called Whitby Jet. Susan samples the local cod and chips before exploring the gothic ruins of Whitby Abbey - famed for inspiring some of the most dramatic scenes in Bram Stoker's Dracula. After a spell at Mother Shipton's Cave - the oldest tourist attraction in England - she meets up with a group whose members reconstruct Roman gladiatorial battles in York. Finally, Susan ventures to Malham Cove, a huge curving amphitheatre-shaped cliff

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Luxury heritage train The Northern Belle, aka steam locomotive 6201 Princess Elizabeth, travels through England's rural north west. Beginning in Preston, the passengers of its stylish 1930s Pullman carriages are soon whisked up through Cumbria and the spectacular landscapes of the Lake District. The train continues on to historic Carlisle, the site of a world-class medieval cathedral and home to supposedly England's most haunted station. It then joins the Settle to Carlisle line, considered one of the most scenic railway routes in the world

programme.title: Stanley Baxter's Best Bits...and More
programme.desc: Documentary profiling the multiple Bafta-winning entertainer, from his early days as a child actor in Glasgow, through his long and celebrated career in radio, theatre, television and films, to the present day. The programme focuses primarily on his golden years in the 1960s and 70s, when his many TV impressions - particularly the Queen (aka the Duchess of Brendagh) - were famous throughout Britain

programme.title: Michael McIntyre: Hello Wembley!
programme.desc: A stand-up performance by the comedian at Wembley Arena, where he entertained a sell-out crowd in October 2009, following on from his successful 2008 show Live and Laughing. In a routine centred on his take on life, he discusses wine menus, restaurant etiquette and the condiment hierarchy in the kitchen cupboard

programme.title: Wonderful World of Chocolate
programme.desc: Documentary offering a glimpse inside the confectionery world, visiting factories, chocolatiers and shops, and even revealing the Queen's favourite chocolates

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Carol and Trevor Gilmour hoped to renovate a barn and turn it into their dream home, but have been forced to live in a caravan during a long-running dispute with their neighbour over the property's front garden. Plus, a young couple gather shocking footage of the constant harassment they endured, and a farmer is suspected of killing a family's dogs

programme.title: Casualty 24/7
programme.desc: Staffing problems hit the department as several nurses call in sick, and young manager Tom has to use his charm to get the team to commit to working extra shifts. Paramedics are concerned about a family that were involved in a road traffic accident, and consultant Julian treats a critically ill patient with undiagnosed symptoms

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Divine Designs
programme.desc: Dr Paul Binski investigates places of worship designed by Christopher Wren after the Great Fire of London in 1666. Assigned to rebuild 51 of the city's churches, he created a trademark open, auditorium-style feel to emphasise the shift from Catholic to Anglican dominance

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice offers advice to the owners of a three-bedroom detached house in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, suggesting a complete overhaul to ensure potential buyers get a good first impression by keeping things simple and adding tasteful antique furniture

programme.title: Arabian Nights (1942)
programme.desc: The story of two half-brothers - one the heroic caliph, the other an evil usurper - as they do battle for the right to rule their kingdom, and win the hand of beautiful dancer Sherazade. Adaptation of the classic adventure tales, starring Jon Hall, Maria Montez, Sabu and Leif Erickson

programme.title: Night Passage (1957)
programme.desc: The black sheep of a family falls in with a gang of outlaws plotting to rob a train operated by his strait-laced brother, but reckons without his sibling's determination to track him down and set him back on the straight and narrow. Western, starring James Stewart, Audie Murphy, Dan Duryea and Brandon de Wilde

programme.title: Strategic Air Command (1955)
programme.desc: A pilot relishes the opportunity to return to the baseball pitch once the Second World War is over. However, his sporting career is put on hold when he's drafted back into the US Air Force and given the opportunity to fly a revolutionary new jet. Drama, starring James Stewart, Frank Lovejoy, Barry Sullivan, Alex Nicol and June Allyson

programme.title: His Girl Friday (1940)
programme.desc: A conniving newspaper editor is horrified to learn his ex-wife - who is also happens to be his best reporter - is planning to remarry. Determined to keep her on his staff, he comes up with the one thing he knows she cannot resist - a big story. Meanwhile, he arranges it so that her fiance has a run of misfortune. Comedy, starring Cary Grant, Rosalind Russell and Ralph Bellamy

programme.title: Sahara (2005)
programme.desc: An explorer stumbles upon evidence that an American Civil War battleship, which was laden with treasure when it sank without trace, has ended up somewhere in the Sahara. However, he is deflected from his mercenary quest to find the hoard by an encounter with a tenacious doctor, whose battle to stop the spread of a deadly disease could be linked to his own mission. Adventure, starring Matthew McConaughey, Penelope Cruz and Steve Zahn

programme.title: The Bone Collector (1999)
programme.desc: A quadriplegic ex-cop is saved from the brink of suicide by a rookie female officer needing his expertise to form a psychological profile of a serial killer. The murderer is posing as a cab driver and terrorising Manhattan, and has a gruesome habit of taking trophies from his victims' bodies. Thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Angelina Jolie, Michael Rooker, Mike McGlone, Luis Guzman and Queen Latifah

programme.title: Slumdog Millionaire (2008)
programme.desc: An uneducated teenager from the Mumbai slums is only one question away from winning a quiz show, but the authorities are reluctant to believe a youngster from such a humble background could succeed without cheating. Under questioning, he tells a police inspector the eventful story of his life - and how he came to know so much. Danny Boyle's Oscar-winning drama, starring Dev Patel and Freida Pinto

programme.title: Kill Your Friends (2015)
programme.desc: A treacherous, cocaine-addicted record executive enjoys success at the height of the Britpop era, but as public tastes change, he finds himself floundering and desperate for a hit. He soon realises that the best way to stay on top is to eliminate his rivals by any means necessary. Drama based on John Niven's novel, starring Nicholas Hoult, Ed Skrein, James Corden and Rosanna Arquette

programme.title: Cottage to Let (1941)
programme.desc: A British inventor's revolutionary bombsight is set to have a positive impact on the war effort. However, military intelligence detects the Nazis are aware of the invention, while a plucky teenage cockney evacuated to the boffin's Scottish country estate sets out to expose a German spy ring. Second World War thriller, with Leslie Banks, John Mills, Alastair Sim and George Cole in his screen debut

programme.title: Ministry of Fear (1944)
programme.desc: An innocent man recently released from a mental hospital inadvertently takes possession of a piece of microfilm meant for a Nazi agent, and finds himself on the run from both the police and the Nazis. Spy thriller based on Graham Greene's novel, starring Ray Milland, Marjorie Reynolds, Carl Esmond and Hillary Brooke

programme.title: To Hell and Back (1955)
programme.desc: Biopic of actor Audie Murphy, following his service in the Second World War. Enlisting in the Army as a teenager to support his younger siblings, he excelled himself in action in the conflict in Europe and became one of America's most decorated soldiers. Starring Murphy as himself alongside Marshall Thompson, Charles Drake and Gregg Palmer

programme.title: The Professionals (1966)
programme.desc: A wealthy Texan hires four mercenaries to rescue his wife, who has been abducted and taken to Mexico by a bandit gang. However, when they find her, she refuses to leave and they have to take her by force - ending in a cross-border chase with the outlaws on their trail. Western adventure, with Burt Lancaster, Lee Marvin, Robert Ryan, Woody Strode, Jack Palance and Claudia Cardinale

programme.title: Max Steel (2016)
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old McGrath is bewildered and unsettled when he suddenly starts exuding increasingly powerful energy from his fingers. As this power grows to dangerous proportions, Max meets Steel, a small but feisty flying alien who says he can help. Family fantasy adventure, starring Ben Winchell, Maria Bello and Andy Garcia, with the voice of Josh Brener

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: Daybreakers (2009)
programme.desc: In the near future, vampires have taken over the world, with the few remaining humans farmed as a food source. An undead scientist tries to develop synthetic blood, only to run into a revolutionary group claiming to have discovered a cure for vampirism. Thriller, starring Ethan Hawke, Willem Dafoe and Sam Neill

programme.title: Kaleidoscope (2016)
programme.desc: A man just been released from prison attempts to get on with his life, but the reappearance of his domineering mother scuppers his plans and unearths deep-seated trauma. Psychological thriller, starring Toby Jones and Anne Reid

programme.title: 7th Cavalry (1956)
programme.desc: An army officer is branded a coward for failing to fight in the Battle of the Little Bighorn, and is unable to convince anyone that official business had detained him. In a bid to repair his damaged reputation, he leads a cavalry detail to retrieve the dead from the battlefield. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Jay C Flippen and Jeanette Nolan

programme.title: Samson and Delilah (1949)
programme.desc: Hebrew warrior Samson becomes a wanted man after crossing paths with Philistine troops, but he constantly thwarts their efforts to capture him using to his incredible strength. Determined to bring him down, the Saran of Gaza makes use of his beguiling sister Delilah, who seduces Samson and manages to rob him of the source of his power. Cecil B DeMille's Oscar-winning adaptation of the biblical tale, starring Victor Mature, Hedy Lamarr, George Sanders, Angela Lansbury and Henry Wilcox

programme.title: Border River (1954)
programme.desc: A Confederate officer takes part in a daring mission to buy weapons to aid in the hard-fought battles against the Yankees, but things go awry, forcing his one true love to save him. Western, starring Joel McCrea, Yvonne de Carlo, Pedro Armendariz and Howard Petrie

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes (1979)
programme.desc: An American heiress befriends an elderly lady on a continental train journey, but wakes one morning to find she has disappeared and the other passengers deny having ever seen the missing woman - leading to suspicions that a conspiracy is afoot. Remake of Hitchcock's 1938 mystery, starring Elliott Gould, Cybill Shepherd, Angela Lansbury, Herbert Lom, Arthur Lowe and Ian Carmichael

programme.title: Knight and Day (2010)
programme.desc: A woman has a chance encounter with a rogue secret agent, who has been framed as a traitor and is on the run from his own superiors. Realising she has been mistaken for his accomplice and is in danger for knowing too much, the fugitive kidnaps her and drags her on a dangerous journey around the world, as he sets out to clear his name and protect a vitally important invention. Comedy adventure, with Tom Cruise, Cameron Diaz and Viola Davis

programme.title: Wind River (2017)
programme.desc: A veteran hunter helps an FBI agent investigate the murder of a young woman on a Wyoming Native American reservation. Taylor Sheridan's crime drama, starring Jeremy Renner and Elizabeth Olsen

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot (1974)
programme.desc: Retired bank robber John Doherty escapes a gunman with the aid of a young car thief, and together they go in search of the loot from the former crook's last job. When they discover the stash is missing - and John's thuggish old partners are also looking for it - the pair decide to do a repeat robbery. Comedy drama, starring Clint Eastwood, Jeff Bridges, George Kennedy and Geoffrey Lewis

programme.title: Free Fire (2016)
programme.desc: It is 1978 and two Irish terrorists are in Boston to buy a shipment of assault rifles from a South African arms dealer, backed-up by hired muscle to help with a deal brokered by a woman and her psychopathic colleague. The deal takes place in a rundown warehouse and it is not long before a minor altercation gets out of hand and bullets start flying in every direction. Ben Wheatley's comedy crime drama, starring Cillian Murphy, Brie Larson, Sharlto Copley and Armie Hammer

programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.desc: Mel wants to get a dog for the household, but Joe is against the idea and argues that he will be the one who gets stuck looking after the animal all off the time. Meanwhile, Ryder finds himself spending more and more time with Stella's daughter rather than with Stella herself. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Zander comes to the house to see Lennox and she begins to feel conflicted about dating her teaching assistant. Meanwhile, Mel persuades Joe to attend a couples therapy session - but is caught off guard when the therapist turns out to be one of his ex-girlfriends. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Harry Hill hosts biscuit day in the junior baking challenge, featuring the show's messiest ever technical round and fairy-tale scenes constructed from biscuit

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Malcolm spends all his time babysitting for the 'ideal family' while his house is being fumigated, and the rest of the Wilkersons are forced to live in a caravan. Comedy, with Frankie Muniz and Jane Kaczmarek

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Malcolm loses Stevie's wheelchair during a sleepover, Francis is forced to undergo a bizarre series of initiation rituals at military school, and Reese tries to prove he is man enough to watch a horror movie. Starring Frankie Muniz and Jane Kaczmarek

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon panics when Leonard announces he has to go into hospital for surgery, and the impending divorce of Raj's parents motivates Howard and Bernadette to work on their own marriage. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is left in a difficult professional situation when a doctor (guest star Billy Bob Thornton) turns up at her door following her flirtatious sales technique, so the guys try to help her out. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and his father deal with unsettled family business. Amy and Rosa work a high-profile case. Terry wants to join the NYPD band

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The youngster becomes inspired by his hero Albert Einstein and tries to play the violin. Mary thinks that she may be pregnant and goes to buy a pregnancy test with Meemaw

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The young genius moves in with Dr Sturgis for a night to see what it would be like to leave home and go to college. During his absence, a lonely Mary tries to bond with other members of the family

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Pilot episode of the comedy about scientists and their friendship with a down-to-earth neighbour. When aspiring actress Penny moves into Leonard's apartment block, he is immediately smitten, but Sheldon warns him that he runs the risk of a broken heart if he tries to woo her. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon helps Leonard drop off a parcel for Penny, but when he sees how messy her flat is, he tries to do a good deed - which is not well received. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is left in a difficult professional situation when a doctor (guest star Billy Bob Thornton) turns up at her door following her flirtatious sales technique, so the guys try to help her out. Meanwhile, Amy and Bernadette have a dispute over whether female scientists should flaunt their sexuality to try to get ahead at work. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: In a New Girl crossover episode, Peralta runs into Jess Day, who is visiting New York from Los Angeles, and enlists her help on his latest case. Holt looks for ways to improve the team's morale as they come to terms with being on the night shift, while Santiago is filled with curiosity when Diaz starts to take long breaks from her desk. Zooey Deschanel (New Girl) and Matt Walsh (Veep) guest star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: After being released from the mental hospital, Dr Sturgis unexpectedly breaks up with Meemaw. US comedy, starring Iain Armitage, Wallace Shawn and Annie Potts

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples are thrown into the second commitment ceremony, where shock decisions are made, surprises are revealed and there are plenty of tears

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy try hanging out as friends when they spend Thanksgiving together at the aquarium. Howard reluctantly agrees to volunteer at a soup kitchen with Bernadette, Raj and Emily. Meanwhile, Penny discovers that Leonard knows more about her than she thought

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is driven to distraction when a tune becomes stuck in his head, while Amy and Dave arrange another date and Howard and Raj discover their band has a fan, but tracking him down turns out to be a mistake. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Mayim Bialik, Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Opinionated TV viewers share their critiques to TV from April 2017, including Kitchen 999: Emergency Chefs, the final of The Voice, Alone with the In-Laws, Line of Duty, Life Story, One Born Every Minute and the News

programme.title: Taskmaster

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Plucky mummy's boy Ash, a wannabe singer whose love life needs fine tuning, kicks off another day of Mediterranean matchmaking. Under the tutelage of assistant manager Francesca he is determined to become a Casanova and meets receptionist Rachel, who's looking for a boy to bring home to her very picky mother. Meanwhile, 43-year-old secretary Sharon is getting ready for her date with destiny and Essex car salesman Kenny seems to fit the bill

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Connor searches for Cordelia, while Angel finds his way into another dimension, on a mission to prove his son was more than just a vessel designed to bring the evil Jasmine into the world. Supernatural drama, starring David Boreanaz

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Nathan loves music as well as his home town of Stoke-on-Trent. So, when bride-to-be Beccie gives him free rein to plan their wedding, he decides to honour them - and not her - with nuptials based on the rare grooves of Northern Soul. Will this groom be able to deliver a swinging day, or will his bride be swinging wildly at him?

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz enlists Peralta to help change Jeffords' disapproving opinion about her fast-moving relationship with Pimento. However, the new couple's love for each other has to be put on hold when Pimento comes to believe that someone from his past is trying to kill him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

However, Matthew and Liam are underwhelmed by the cleanliness levels

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the New Osborne Hotel in Blackpool on their second night, where proprietor Matthew Bracegirdle and entertainment manager Liam hope their guests feel at home in their family friendly establishment. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Fairy Falls Hotel in Trefriw, Conwy County Borough, where B&B newcomers Jackie and Paul Langshaw hope to impress the other contestants. programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

A young Asian elephant keeps the rest of the herd entertained as they adapt to the loss of two members to a virus. The keepers believe it needs a playmate its own age, but their hopes rest on the bull elephant mating with the females once more

As the builders set to work on the handcrafted flint exterior, complete with a vast trapezoid window, the pair juggle construction with farming the land, and in an attempt to make the project work financially, they set up a microbrewery in the barn. Kevin McCloud follows their progress

The presenter shows them another small home, to illustrate that bigger is not always better

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit is to the 12th-century Oxenham Arms, Devon, where owners Simon and Lyn Powell hope to kick-off the competition in style. The guests participate in broom dancing and after throwing some moves, the hosts have fellow contestant John pegged as the one to watch

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Elegant House bed and breakfast in Liverpool on their second night, where host John Brady hopes his unique property will stand out from the crowd. Nikki and David get to grips with the unconventional facilities, and David reveals his background as a hotel inspector - with Amanda making her opinions on the star rating system very clear

The next morning, the DIY breakfast proves underwhelming for some, while the hosts discover that the great outdoors is not everyone's cup of tea

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former hotel inspector and owner David Stanbridge and manager Nikki Deans welcome the contestants to the Cley Hall Hotel in Spalding, Lincolnshire. Peter and Amanda are impressed by their room, but Simon and Lyn are unhappy with the state of the carpet. The next morning, the guests decide to put their eight-minute breakfast rule to the test, and some of them have concerns about Nikki's waitressing skills

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for the final time to find out what they've been paid and confront their critics. Simon and Lyn kick off proceedings by demanding answers from John about his disturbed night's sleep, but then find themselves taken to task by David over their cleanliness feedback. However, the former hotel inspector receives his own interrogation from Peter and Amanda, who want to know why he didn't praise their shared bathroom facilities. Tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect showcases innovative designs that demonstrate that big things can be achieved on small budgets - from a shed transformed into a Tardis to a home in Herefordshire built without any budget at all. In Texas, George visits a family home made out of 'earth bags' as well as one of the smallest homes ever seen on the show

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: With Christmas fast approaching, the keepers try to get the animals into the festive spirit. Stockings have been hung for the Sumatran orang-utan family, only for eight-year-old Indah to open everyone else's. There is concern about the health of reticulated python Bali, who has been off her food for more than three months. She needs a check-up, but at 23ft it takes 10 brave keepers to catch her. Malayan tapirs Marjorie and Bitong welcome a baby, however the new dad is not happy when his daughter comes between him and his partner, and sun bear couple Tony and Millie's relationship is growing stale - will a trial separation help?

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge takes children Arthur and Dorothy on a mission to rescue baby toads in their chateau grounds. Donna and Paul put the rest of their renovations on hold as they set themselves the challenge of turning a wing of the chateau into a self-contained apartment for Donna's parents, Anne and Brian

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets actor Sean Simons, who has bought the ruins of Cloontykilla Castle in Co Roscommon with a view to using them to create a spectacular mock 16th-century home. However, the outlandish plans - including Jacuzzis in the battlements and water-spouting gargoyles - have Kevin worried the project could become a garish nightmare, and his scepticism increases when he realises Sean has not consulted an architect. Disaster seems to be looming as the contractors grow frustrated and planning regulations are ignored, but somehow things slowly begin to take shape - until a national economic crisis plunges everything into chaos

They've fallen in love with the island and are now determined to buy their very own holiday home there. Danni Menzies shows them five properties for their £75,000 budget, but will any of them be the romantic getaway they've been dreaming of?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel the length of Britain turning unwanted junk into profit for their owners. In this episode they're on the south coast, where Henry gets to work an aircraft fuel tank while Simon gets obsessed with an iconic '60s speedboat

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Surrey and Middlesex. Henry restores a pair of racing go-karts to race against restorer Guy, and Simon repurposes an old butcher's block into a coffee table

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge takes children Arthur and Dorothy on a mission to rescue baby toads in their chateau grounds. Donna and Paul put the rest of their renovations on hold as they set themselves the challenge of turning a wing of the chateau into a self-contained apartment for Donna's parents, Anne and Brian

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Ele and Steve George, who are building an eco home on the banks of the River Severn in Gloucestershire, but have run into trouble with manufacturing delays and bad weather, while juggling the new build with a new baby. The presenter sends the couple to see one of Britain's most environmentally friendly self-built houses, in the hope it will inspire them to finish their project on time and under budget

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Five Bells near Dover, where manager Shelley Parnell and her competitive mum Linda Yates hope their bargain-priced B&B will win the day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts check in to the Thomas Paine Hotel in Thetford, where an inappropriate book is found in a bedside drawer and competition turns fierce at a Home Guard training exercise

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Chris and Sarah Whitehead invite their fellow hoteliers to Tenbury Wells in Worcestershire, where they open the doors of their historic pub The Rose and Crown

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lesley and Steve Hawker welcome the contestants to the Woodlands Guest House in Exmoor, but after the bad feedback of previous rounds, it seems their rivals are out for revenge

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet up to find out what they have been paid. Shelley and Linda from The Five Bells want to know why their feedback for breakfast doesn't add up, while Gez from the Thomas Paine Hotel wants to find out why Shelley and Linda scored him so low. Chris and Sarah from The Rose and Crown want to question Gez, and Steve and Lesley from Woodlands Guest House try to get to the naked truth

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George meets a father-of-three building a campervan for less than £700, made from old CDs and vinyl records, and a single dad who is renovating an oil-rig escape pod to make a home for himself and sons on the water. The presenter also continues his German road trip with a visit to the Tyrolean mountains, where he finds a house that looks like a cross between a large bird and a UFO, and he and Will Hardie save a decrepit old wartime lookout shed to use as the basis for their floating beach hut

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Pedro the giant anteater is about to be reunited with long-term mate Bliss, but falls ill and faces a major operation, with an uncertain outcome. Chester Zoo's extremely rare bald ibises produce a batch of new chicks, which are destined to be released back into the wild in southern Spain. There is also a chance to witness the reunion of rhino couple Beni and Asha, who have been kept separate for four years

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick and Arthur race to collect low-hanging fruit to make delicious redcurrant jelly. In south-west France, Donna and Paul are hard at work on their most ambitious project yet, creating a tea room. However, stringent building regulations add to the challenge. Elsewhere, Ithaca and Alex need to raise some cash to help repair their chateau's 300-year-old roof

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The 11 remaining contestants slab-build a 3D building. Plus, Rich Miller tasks the potters to handmake bricks, as he and fellow judge Keith Brymer Jones decide who will be named potter of the week and who will be leaving the pottery. Siobhan McSweeney hosts

programme.title: Rebecka Martinsson: Arctic Murders
programme.desc: Part two of two. A suspect in the reopened cold case begins to play unsettling mind-games with Rebecka. Sven-Erik is obsessed with building the case in the face of the rest of the team's scepticism and Anna Maria has to rein him in. However, he remains convinced that he is right. Thriller, starring Sascha Zacharias, Eva Melander and Thomas Oredsson. In Swedish

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A man with schizophrenia is admitted for the 19th time in a year after failing to take his diabetes medication. Meanwhile, a former betting-shop manager and a 16-year-old both suffer suspected strokes - the 61-year-old, once known as the 'memory man', is now coming to terms with his diminishing mental capabilities, while the teenager's identical twin and mother wait by his bedside for the results of a brain scan

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The latest batch of patients to be treated in the A&E department of London's King's College Hospital includes two with serious head injuries, including a cyclist from Brighton who has been airlifted to the building. Also brought in by helicopter is a father-of-four who fell from scaffolding as he repaired a roof, while other cases include former docker Bill, who has hurt his knee while drinking at his local working men's club

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits California, where his job is to help the owner of Lido Di Manhattan. Lisa Marie Hemmat, an ambitious business school graduate, has been running the restaurant for the past five years, but has failed to exert any control over the kitchen and the menu. The chef tries to teach her the basics of cooking and venue management, but trouble brews when her staff threaten to walk out on relaunch night

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A man with schizophrenia is admitted for the 19th time in a year after failing to take his diabetes medication. programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

Also brought in by helicopter is a father-of-four who fell from scaffolding as he repaired a roof, while other cases include former docker Bill, who has hurt his knee while drinking at his local working men's club

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priests organise a raffle to raise funds to repair their leaky roof, planning to award a car as the prize. Unfortunately, Ted accidentally wrecks it before the grand draw takes place, and embarks on a frantic search for a replacement. Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon play the Craggy Island clerics

programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank pick New York City for the first time and go back to the future at a sprawling computer store packed with a mind-blowing stockpile

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys are stunned by a house with storefronts frozen in time, containing a bounty of never-sold stock and a secret bootlegging basement

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz have their work cut out for them on a huge property, which includes a collection of more custom 1932 Fords than they have ever seen in one place

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers are on the lookout for day-trippers trying to smuggle prescription pills back into America, bought cheaply from one of the 200 pharmacies on the other side of the border

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters try to make an ordinary second-hand car lap the test track as fast as a new, purpose-built sports saloon. James May meets former Formula 1 World Champion Mika Hakkinen to discover why Finns are such good racing drivers, Richard Hammond tests the Veritas sports car, and actor Mark Wahlberg is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: In Houston, Eddie faces the 'grim reaper' in a crawfish challenge featuring the fearsome reaper pepper. He also devours some southern comfort food and pulls a plane down a runway

programme.title: Rick Stein's Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef continues his exploration of the Far East's most diverse food cultures, travelling to Thailand where he meets one of his heroes, David Thompson, who has devoted himself to understanding Thai cuisine. He also takes a train to Phuket to learn the art of hot and sour tom yum goong, and visits Melaka to explore the Nyonya-style cooking

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters are challenged to drive from Switzerland to Blackpool on just one tank of fuel, and the winner gets to switch on the Blackpool illuminations. James May also power-tests the Pagani Zonda F Roadster, and the Stig sets a lap time in the Bugatti Veyron. Comedian Harry Enfield is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Eddie Eats America

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.desc: Customer relations associate and part-time drag queen Adam plans a theatrical night of flamboyance as the culinary competition continues in the Derby and Nottingham area. programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug begin to realise how much they miss spending time alone together, and try to get Arthur out of the house as much as possible - by sending him off to work at cousin Danny's pizza restaurant

First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. programme.desc: Undergraduate Inzy is the fourth host in Liverpool, and he is on a mission to prove students really can cook. The flirting between him and Toria continues, but will he allow love to stand in way of the competition?

programme.desc: In Liverpool, property developer Christine plans to wow her guests with a Spanish holiday-themed dinner party. However, the mood is rather more feisty than fiesta as on-going tensions finally come to a head and it's not long before the honesty - and the sparks - begin to fly

Jamie also celebrates the weekend with a scrumptious veggie tikka masala, with beautiful marinated and grilled veggies served with paneer cheese and amazing little pancakes to mop up the classic sauce. Jimmy has a smoking hot tip for oven-cooked barbecue ribs that looks impressive, but is actually super simple to do

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Another selection of neighbourly conflicts, featuring a dispute between two retired men about a new driveway, which resulted in the pair fighting in the street in the Tayside town of Kinross. The Webbs' peace in rural Plymouth was shattered when a new family moved in a few doors away, and a row about parking erupted into a full-blown punch-up. Meanwhile, Rita Grootendorst claims to have been the victim of a land grab by her next-door neighbours, although she is the one who has been arrested for assault and criminal damage over a drainpipe

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Wiltshire couple Edward Lea and his wife found their happy retirement was short-lived when an imposing 8ft breeze-block wall - dubbed the Great Wall of China - was built by their neighbour between their properties. In Scotland, Karen Ryrie and her elderly mother are fed up with living opposite John Tyer, his three dogs and a huge family of rabbits. Following their complaint about the smell, Karen's subsequent accusation of assault has made the dispute far more serious. Elsewhere, Linda Bird had not been expecting to wear headphones around the house when she moved to Bedfordshire for a quiet life, but the issue has escalated beyond excessive noise to become a battle over boundaries with neighbour Stanislav Fajdel

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Steve are sent to north London to evict a young Romanian mother who owes £6,000 in unpaid rent, but when they arrive, they discover a family home that is not quite what it appears to be. Meanwhile, in Kent, Brian and Alan turn up the pressure on a debtor who has admitted to owing more than £7,000, but claims he cannot afford to pay up - despite having a garage full of expensive tools. Later, in south-west London, Brian accompanies Delroy as he tries to recover a £400,000 debt from a residential property, and when the pair trace the defaulter to an upmarket cafe, the man in charge lies about his identity

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Steve have an emotional confrontation in Berkshire when a tearful woman accuses her landlord of fleecing her for extra rent, while Brian and Del travel to Luton to recover £4,500 owed by an elusive debtor who has been giving them the runaround

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, father-and-son team Del and Dael Anglin face death threats from a debtor's father, after arriving at a property to collect a debt of over £3,500. Meanwhile, in east London, two agents are confronted with a tenant who claims to have had no prior warning that he is being evicted from his tiny bedsit. Del and Brian try to recover £6,000 owed by a London hotel to a catering supply company, and Paul and Steve must tackle a difficult eviction

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In north London, agents Del and Dael chase nearly £2,000 owed by a printing company, but the owner denies the debt and starts getting physical. Meanwhile, Stewart and Elmor find themselves caught up in a personal dispute when they try to collect rent arrears from a barber's shop, and in Bedfordshire, Del and Brian try to recover almost £2,000 owed to a funeral director. programme.desc: The true crime series returns with the case of pharmacist Mitesh Patel. In 2018 he called police to tell them he had returned home to find his wife, Jessica, murdered. However, it was all a lie. Within weeks, Mitesh's double life as a gay man had become apparent to the police. Far from being a committed husband and pillar of the Hindu community, he had been plotting an affair with his lover in Australia

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The crimes of serial killer Dennis Nilsen, who was arrested in February 1983 after human remains were found in his household drains. It was later discovered he had liked to bathe and dress his victims' corpses, and was guilty of killing at least 12 young men in and around his home in the north London district of Muswell Hill

programme.title: Filthy House SOS

Presented by James Richardson, Sarah-Jane Crawford and Magnus Ver Magnusson, with commentary by Colin Bryce and Danny Wallace

programme.title: World's Strongest Man 2017
programme.desc: Action from the third heat in Botswana, which featured six tasks including the 15-tonne Bus Pull, the 350kg Dead Lift and the 200kg Elephant Carry. Presented by James Richardson, Sarah-Jane Crawford and Magnus Ver Magnusson, with commentary by Colin Bryce and Danny Wallace

programme.title: World's Strongest Man 2017
programme.desc: Action from the fourth heat in Botswana, which featured Britain's Eddie Hall - a four-time winner of Britain's Strongest Man who finished third in the 2016 event. However, 'The Beast' faced strong competition from the likes of Mateusz Kieliszkowski, an up-and-coming star from Poland. Presented by James Richardson, Sarah-Jane Crawford and Magnus Ver Magnusson, with commentary by Colin Bryce and Danny Wallace

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A dispute between households arising from investments made into a business venture that later failed, and the fury surrounding the construction of an extension that saw damage to an adjacent property. Plus, updates on people and stories featured in previous programmes, including the latest whereabouts of rowdy rapper Elvis Turasinze, who drove his neighbours berserk with his beat-making

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The story of a dispute involving a female student and the man living upstairs, which descended into violence. Plus, how Doug and Mavis moved into a new house with their menagerie of animals and were stunned when a neighbour complained about the noise. But that turned out to be just the beginning of their troubles

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, father-and-son team Del and Dael Anglin face death threats from a debtor's father, after arriving at a property to collect a debt of over £3,500. Meanwhile, in east London, two agents are confronted with a tenant who claims to have had no prior warning that he is being evicted from his tiny bedsit. Del and Brian try to recover £6,000 owed by a London hotel to a catering supply company, and Paul and Steve must tackle a difficult eviction

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor visit Nottingham to chase almost £8,000 owed by a car dealership to a dissatisfied customer, while on the Isle of Wight, Brian and Del try to collect £3,700 of unpaid estate agency fees. The job begins peacefully, until one of the agents is physically assaulted by the debtor's wife. In Lancashire, Stewart and Iain struggle to identify the person who owes almost £2,000 after a failed compensation claim, while Del and Dael try to recover nearly £3,500 from a businessman in west London

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, Del and Dael Anglin receive a hostile reception from the brother of a debtor who has alreasy defaulted on a promise to pay £2,000 she owes to a storage company. In Worcestershire, Gareth and Craig try to recover £45,000 from a young online entrepreneur, who claims no responsibility for the debt he owes to his courier. Their target cooks up a flimsy lie in an effort to absolve himself, but dishonesty proves to be the least of the agents' worries when they discover a stash of guns at the back of the garage. In east London, an Indian restaurant owner begins to take his financial responsibilities seriously when Del and Dael start removing cookers and freezers from his premises, and a pair of pensioners in Oxfordshire hope the High Court will provide them a lifeline as they try to pay off a £4,000 bill to a solicitors' firm after a failed compensation claim

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Craig investigate a possible case of mistaken identity in Shropshire, then in south Wales find themselves embroiled in a bitter dispute between two dog owners over a vet's bill. Steve and Phil have to evict a distraught young family from a former high street bank in west London, before paying a call on an elderly tailor in north London

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Sheila is devastated to learn that Clive and Jane are together, and Aaron confronts David over his lack of leniency towards Nicolette

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Nikau declares he is returning to the Parata house, and Mac is comforted by the idea that Leon is unlikely to attack with the cops hanging around

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Richard and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. They begin with Lincolnshire single mum, Sam, who has dedicated her life to caring for her disabled daughter, leaving no time for cleaning

programme.title: Britain's Parking Hell
programme.desc: A series documenting the daily battles across Britain for parking spaces, looking at the struggles faced by motorists, councils and private parking companies. The parking enforcers of Weston-super-Mare are under pressure as 100,000 visitors descend on this popular seaside town on bank holiday Monday

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Documentary following emergency response teams on their most extreme medical callouts

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: A man who fell through a window has a phobia of needles, which leads him to refuse any kind of pain relief and even attempt to discharge himself before his injuries are treated. An aggressive patient is brought in by four police officers after smashing up his mother's home, and has to undergo a toxicology test. Dr Audrey Fox tries to save the life of a patient who has overdosed, and a woman suffers a head injury after slipping on a slice of pizza her husband had left on the floor for their dog to eat

programme.title: Bargain Brits on Benefits
programme.desc: Cameras follow folks whose clever ideas and savvy schemes save them a small fortune

programme.title: The Woman in Black (2012)
programme.desc: A lawyer tormented by the death of his wife is sent to a remote village to put deceased client Alice Drablow's affairs in order. The locals are suspicious of outsiders and determined to keep the area's tragic history a secret, and the late Mrs Drablow's isolated house appears to be haunted by a vengeful spirit that seems hell-bent on redressing a decades-past grievance. Horror based on Susan Hill's novel, with Daniel Radcliffe and Ciaran Hinds

programme.title: World's Strongest Man 2017

Presented by James Richardson, Sarah-Jane Crawford and Magnus Ver Magnusson, with commentary by Colin Bryce and Danny Wallace

programme.desc: James Richardson presents action from Britain's Strongest Man at Sheffield Arena, the opening round of the Giants Live Qualifying Tour. Eddie Hall, the World's Strongest Man in 2017, was looking to win this title for a record fifth time. With commentary by Colin Bryce and Danny Wallace

programme.title: World's Strongest Man 2018
programme.desc: James Richardson presents action from the Scandinavian Open from Norrkoping, Sweden, where Johannes Arsjo aimed to defend his title in the Giants Live Qualifying Tour event. Among those looking to usurp the home favourite as champion were Martin Forsmark, Johnny Hanssont and Zydrunas Savickas. With commentary by Colin Bryce and Danny Wallace

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: An incident featuring a wheelie bin and a birthday cake sparks a bitter conflict between two neighbours in Wales, and there are explosive consequences when householders take the law into their own hands after continuous loud music drives them to distraction. Meanwhile, a Suffolk man faces eviction after his fellow residents report his toxic cars to the local environmental health office

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents face a raft of excuses and stalling tactics as they try to recover £3,000 from a young debtor in Manchester, and a Kent businessman tries to protect his company from his ex-wife by claiming that it belongs to his sister. A Staffordshire optician who owes money to a supplier claims that the equipment he was sold was faulty, while enforcement agents in north London are forced to mediate between a tenant who claims she is being evicted for having children and a landlord who says she wanted to leave in the hope of getting a council house

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Experienced enforcement agent Stewart and trainee Iain head to Blackpool to chase down a builder owing nearly £3,500 to an unhappy customer, while father and son Del and Dael are in Essex to collect over £2,500 owed to a frozen food company. In south London, Del and Brian attempt to recover nearly £10,000 from a debtor who acted as guarantor for a friend's rental agreement, ending in a bizarre stand-off with the debtor's daughter

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben try to drill through the locks on a property to evict the residents, only to find to their surprise that the door has been modified with special reinforced metal. Delroy and Brian try to reclaim money a garage owes to a customer and are shocked by the condition of the vehicle in question, and a woman who has acted as guarantor for her sister's tenancy does not realise the extent of her responsibilities

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: When Amy learns Lassiters are doing a photo shoot with the original uniform prototypes, she freaks out, and Ricardo's indecent proposal still hangs over Nicolette

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: The Paratas take turns to watch the house overnight, Ziggy feels terrible about the mess she caused, and John dives into the world of online dating

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord tries to recover £30,000 in unpaid rent through the courts

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on two residential disputes that escalated from complaints about noise-making to far more serious quarrels. Warren and Sharee detail how their peaceful lives in a quiet Birmingham suburb were ruined when new neighbour Harry moved in. Harry complained of noise the pair knew wasn't coming from their household, an accusation he would level more than once, and with increasing intensity. Finally, when the hostile Harry pulled out a gun and threatened the couple over their garden fence, they were forced to sell up and move out. However, even after relocating, it seemed their nightmare was not over. Also featured is the story of Jill, who was just a teenager when Barry, who lived with his parents next-door, became fixated on her family making a racket. Brushing off the grievance, Jill and her relatives tried to get on with their lives, but one autumn day the feud took a tragic, life-changing turn

programme.title: As Good as It Gets (1997)
programme.desc: A bigoted misanthropic writer, who treats everyone he meets with contempt, is forced to look after a gay neighbour's dog, and develops an empathy with another creature for the first time in years. Sensing a need for human company, he pursues an unlikely romance with a waitress, who is the only person willing to put up with his rudeness. Romantic comedy drama, with Jack Nicholson, Helen Hunt, Cuba Gooding Jr and Greg Kinnear

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Matt's ex-wife comes for a surprise visit after Jules invites her to stay with them, while Matt and Angie are hired by a husband to determine if his wife has a stalker

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of Richard Speigel, chief financial officer for an exclusive, family owned department store, results in the arrests of the shop staff - but the manager and father refuses to let his offspring take the blame, and goes all out to get them off the hook. Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A novelist's apparent suicide becomes a murder case, with the evidence leading Lupo and his new partner Kevin Bernard to suspect a secretive religious group. Award-winning police drama, starring Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A legal-aid strike leads first to murder, and then to Rubirosa pitting her wits against Cutter as the ADA tries to bring a case against a pro golfer accused of the killing of a paralegal. American legal drama, starring Alana De La Garza and Linus Roache

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The squad investigates when a wealthy man is found murdered, and discover his family were all striving to get their hands on the inheritance. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman's murder leads Lupo and Bernard to learn she was secretly in conflict with her husband, going against his desire that their family lead an environmentally friendly life. The case is complicated further when a dead passenger and drugs turn up in the car she was using, with the complexity continuing in the courtroom as Cutter suspects someone has been tampering with evidence. Guest starring Ned Beatty (Deliverance) and Sherry Stringfield (ER)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when lawyers Fred and Lizzy Bellamy are found murdered in their sleep. The case leads them to two couples who are in the process of adopting children from Haiti, but the detectives uncover signs of abuse that point to a human-trafficking ring

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The suspected murder of a petty officer turns out to be a ghoulish practical joke - but a genuine death follows shortly afterwards. As inquiries proceed, local investigators are also assigned to the case - and prove to have personal characteristics remarkably similar to those of Gibbs's staff. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ducky identifies two dismembered bodies as those of a prosecutor and a sheriff he worked with on a rape case 10 years previously, and realises he could be the killer's next target. Despite Gibbs' attempts to protect him, he is later kidnapped - and the team's search for clues leads to a macabre showdown at a funeral home. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A woman claims to have witnessed the murder of a sailor, but a lack of physical evidence causes the team to question what actually took place. Spurred by his gut instinct, McGee perseveres in his search for clues and soon discovers there is more to the case than he could have imagined

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called to investigate the discovery of a US Marine's body at the foot of a cliff. Gibbs immediately suspects the man's ex-wife and his best friend are guilty of murder, and tries to turn them against each other. Meanwhile, Abby puts her technical skills to the test by trying to repair a camera that was broken during the victim's fall

programme.title: The Murders
programme.desc: Kate and Nolan must navigate a world of hidden prejudices within a South Asian community as they investigate a vehicular manslaughter case. Drama, starring Jessica Lucas

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a six-year-old boy who is believed to have collapsed during an exorcism at a late-night church service. However, forensics reveal the victim was smothered before the rite took place, casting suspicion on his foster parents and social worker. Starring Christopher Meloni, Ice-T and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The police discover a 12-year-old boy posted sinister threats to a girl in an internet chatroom and suspect his anger stems from sexual abuse. The trail soon leads Benson and Stabler to a billionaire known for his generous donations to charities and his hospitality to young house guests

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cabot investigates the rape and murder of an undercover federal agent, but receives death threats as the case proceeds toward trial. The arrest of a suspect connected with a Colombian drug cartel puts her under pressure to yield the case to the authorities. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Stephanie March

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A doctor takes a paternity test that could prove his guilt in the murders of a mother and her baby. The procedure appears to prove he is not the father - but does implicate him in several child molestation cases. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Beckett and Castle investigate when a movie star turned theatre actor is mysteriously killed, learning the thespian had more to worry about than just his lines. With Nathan Fillion, Stana Katic and guest star Jewel Staite

programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the world of online romance when a garage mechanic is murdered, but the case takes a series of bizarre turns before they are able to identify the killer. Police drama, starring Anthony Anderson and Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A jeweller's murder is linked to a prostitution business, and the subsequent trial puts McCoy's job on the line as interested parties try to call in old favours. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The shooting of a sleazy retired policeman in a neighbourhood notorious for prostitution leads Briscoe and Curtis to two suburban housewives who are secretly moonlighting. However, it soon becomes apparent that whoever killed the victim could have been acting in self-defence. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when a plaintiff involved in a high-profile lawsuit against airline Pan World is found dead in his car. The detectives soon discover the case had been delayed after the presiding judge was murdered and the clues lead to a lawyer willing to do anything for money

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when Harold and Joyce Foley arrive home to find their son and housekeeper murdered. The detectives start to believe the couple's work on a controversial pharmaceutical study made them targets, until further evidence changes their minds

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The body of a petty officer is found lying in bed next to a barman - but he insists she is not the woman he brought home with him the previous night. The investigation leads Gibbs and the team to the victim's sister (R'n'B star Mya), who is a singer in a rival bartender's dance club. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team try to find out who is responsible for sending a parcel containing a pair of blue human eyeballs to the home of a petty officer who works in Intelligence. However, the recipient of the organs commits suicide during the course of the inquiry, which leads the investigators to suspect one of his lecturers, who is working for the CIA in Panama

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU pursues a suspect when a child is discovered in the boot of an abandoned car. Olivia Benson and her detectives to chase down the perpetrator - who is now missing. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Kelli Giddish

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An assistant district attorney is found strangled in his car in an area notorious for prostitution. Benson is shocked to realise she briefly dated the victim and refuses to believe he would have paid for sex. As investigations get under way, DNA evidence reveals the dead man might have been gay. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The rape and murder of a criminology student puts detectives Stabler and Benson on the trail of a killer with an expert knowledge of forensics. A discovery about the victim's mentor places him at the top of their list of suspects - but as further evidence is gathered, it begins to seem that someone might have tried to frame him for the crime

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detective Munch becomes personally involved in the prosecution of a terminally ill embryologist who is accused of assisting a depressed woman in committing suicide. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler tries to rescue a youngster who has been kidnapped by a man with schizophrenia, but resorts to unorthodox tactics that jeopardise his own career. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man is arrested for assaulting his alcoholic wife, who is pregnant - but changes the focus of the case by trying to have her charged with neglect for drinking while expecting a baby. programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Insurance investigator Dennis Stanton is drawn into a murder case while looking into a bizarre missing persons report involving a ventriloquist's dummy, and asks for Jessica's help in clearing it up. Keith Michell guest stars

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Shade and Angie go undercover as an engaged couple to investigate a jewellery heist

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An angry woman who blames her former daughter-in-law's new husband for her son's death hires a hitman to exact retribution. Briscoe and Curtis manage to get their hands on the contract killer but fail to understand why his customer has gone to such extreme lengths

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Bernard and Lupo investigate when a stockbroker admitted to hospital dies on the operating table from severe internal bleeding. When the case reaches court, McCoy is forced to make one of the most controversial arguments of his career and his path crosses with ADA Cutter

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man is found murdered in a local park and the death is initially linked to drugs, but as Bernard and Lupo investigate they discover fingerprints at the scene that lead them to a man with learning difficulties who holds the key to the killing

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: First of a three-part story. The team investigates when the headless corpse of a film studio executive is found floating in a river, and her personal trainer and ex-husband soon prove likely suspects. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when a trucking company owner is found murdered. They suspect his business partner Stan Klein is the culprit when they discover his links to the Russian mob and a scheme to defraud the victim, but as the case comes to court it seems Klein's son may have had reason to kill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the death of a troubled NYPD officer, a man with mounting financial difficulties who was killed by colleagues after taking hostages at gunpoint. As the pair dig deeper into his life, they discover a stash of valuable documents in his apartment as well as a body, and the evidence leads to a man claiming to be the illegitimate son of a famous president

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The body of a petty officer is found lying in bed next to a barman - but he insists she is not the woman he brought home with him the previous night. The investigation leads Gibbs and the team to the victim's sister (R'n'B star Mya), who is a singer in a rival bartender's dance club. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team try to find out who is responsible for sending a parcel containing a pair of blue human eyeballs to the home of a petty officer who works in Intelligence. However, the recipient of the organs commits suicide during the course of the inquiry, which leads the investigators to suspect one of his lecturers, who is working for the CIA in Panama

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is killed while competing in a swimsuit contest, raising fears she may have fallen victim to a jealous rival, or even a stalker. Gibbs' investigation leads to the discovery that the victim was taking yoga classes - and this provides him with the breakthrough he needs to solve the case. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An officer is found dead, and evidence initially suggests she committed suicide as a result of a nervous breakdown. However, a sceptical Ducky believes foul play was involved - and the team later discovers the victim was caught up in a love triangle. Kevin Quigley guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the murder of an elderly woman who they learn was dying of cancer but had been determined to live out her final days to the full - a philosophy that encompassed dating a variety of men. Discovering her most recent gentleman callers all have alibis, they turn their attention to the murder weapon and realise they are looking for a serial killer. Anthony Rapp and Jane Krakowski guest star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Novak enlists Clark's help to gather evidence against a judge whose unacceptable bias in two child-abuse cases resulted in the death of a youngster and the wrongful imprisonment of an innocent woman. Police drama, starring Diane Neal, Marlo Thomas, Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A school headmistress is caught on camera sexually assaulting a teenage boy, but her behaviour later proves to have been caused by an operable brain tumour, prompting Novak and the team to allow a plea bargain. Unfortunately, the case turns out to have unforeseen complications. Starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Diane Neal

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a poster boy for a pressure group that tries to steer gay people towards heterosexuality. Suspicion falls on a cleric who was conducting a hate-mail campaign against the victim - but it transpires he has a watertight alibi. George Segal guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A wealthy philanthropist who was accused of rape and kidnap is killed. A former supermodel whose daughter was attacked is blamed for the murder - but Benson is alarmed to find herself implicated by the defendant's wily attorney. Jacqueline Bisset guest stars alongside Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The discovery of a child's body sends Stabler and Cragen in search of a suspected paedophile, but important medical evidence emerges that implicates someone close to the child. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Dann Florek

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The author and Beckett are abducted and forced to solve twisted puzzles with strangers, while Alexis and the rest of the team race to save them

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Paul Laidlaw and Claire Rawle set off on the final road trip leg from the Derbyshire town of Matlock. Militaria mad Paul hopes a late 17th-century hand-forged halberd head earns him a huge profit. Claire buys a Chinese cloisonné vase and an Edwardian inkstand. Paul also unravels the story behind the world-famous crooked church tower at Chesterfield and Claire meets a relative of the first man to circumnavigate Australia, who hails from the Lincolnshire town of Donnington. The pressure is on at the final auction in Stamford, Lincolnshire.

programme.title: My Violent Child
programme.desc: Therapist Mandy Saligari heads to Nottingham, where single mum Hazel has six children but is struggling to deal with one of them, who is out of control and showing signs of violence. Eight-year old Jordan rules the roost, terrorising his five siblings, punching his mum, and trashing the furniture, so Mandy uses a blend of plain speaking and direct action to help him and his family

programme.title: Embarrassing Fat Bodies
programme.desc: Pixie McKenna encounters three huge hernias, and Christian Jessen meets Malissa Jones, who, aged 18, became one of the youngest patients in Britain to undergo an operation to fit a gastric band in 2008

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard and Tee John take a road trip in Hungary. In Budapest, they visit one of the country's biggest antique markets. Later, they unearth treasures in a former communist factory

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: In the inky depths of an ancient pool, a trio of soothsayers cast a dark judgement upon Arthur. But despite Merlin's warnings, the headstrong king refuses to take their words seriously, so their fury rains down on Camelot. With the kingdom in jeopardy, only the greatest sacrifice can appease them - but is it one Arthur is prepared to make? Colin Morgan, Bradley James star in the fantasy drama

However, her kidnapper is none other than Morgana, who has imprisoned the queen in a place that haunts the dreams of men. Before them lays a landscape riddled with hidden dangers, perilous obstacles and magical beings - but surely, the sorceress wouldn't have made it quite that easy?

programme.title: Britain's Most Evil Killers

programme.title: Wynonna Earp

For his part, Fish just wants to find his reanimated boyfriend. Doc Holliday's return undermines a sordid deal between the Stone Witch and Bobo Del Rey. Meanwhile, having found his boyfriend in a bad way, Wynonna grants Fish a final request. Western drama, starring Melanie Scrofano
